results.title: Global Market: SK Hynix jumps 13% as easing US inflation, AI memory optimism lift chip stocks
results.description: South Korean semiconductor shares experienced a significant surge on Wednesday. This rally was fueled by softer U.S. inflation data and renewed AI demand optimism. SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics saw substantial gains in early trading. Analysts foresee strong structural demand from AI applications supporting the memory market. Industry experts predict a severe memory supply shortage extending beyond 2030.

results.title: Domestic Construction Contract Could Exceed 2025 Of RM49 Billion
results.description: Hong Leong Investment Bank Bhd (HLIB) has maintained its OVERWEIGHT call on the construction sector, with Sunway Construction Group Bhd (SunCon) and IJM Corporation Bhd (IJM) as its top picks with target prices of RM9.10 and RM3.02 respectively, as strong data centre-related projects and infrastructure opportunities are expected to support growth in the second half [...]

results.title: Polymarket sees 92.5% odds of July Fed hold as crypto jumps on easing inflation
results.description: Bitcoin climbed above $64,000 after a report said inflation eased, with Zcash and Pump.fun among rally leaders. (Read More)
